textByHash.10d553c8b89b5f46a95a66b8f68af5b8a07ccc44: But why should we tell you?
textByHash.a4e7603f6aff8d322dc4246cbe0da7a0011d31d9: These are our trade secrets, you know.
textByHash.8abbd510ec2a0bd96941e7496cbdd8af7ce087c4: Don't be stupid! Can we teach him ratcatching?
textByHash.3143a565e66657e8655ebdbfd9668f925c16a523: Don't be stupid! Can we teach her ratcatching?
textByHash.584d3c9016e273520f4d6cf346f495b743c51f3e: Don't be stupid! Can we teach them ratcatching?
textByHash.bf92a64786258925143847457005d77a8ed7ad23: That's no good. How do we know you didn't buy it?
textByHash.cc8327e65d60f0f1e1e86670776979deb638b664: We'll tell you what we know.
textByHash.1f5b0c82d84fe84fb60b5072801bf8963b116f7d: Great! Let's have a sniff then.
textByHash.3877919f3f3b291cecba1eba31b21cc70950f0c7: 8 ratsies. And your cat has to catch them. Any you get don't count.
textByHash.61af07a7cd49f3505f849529dde29fbd9ff63b6e: Are you making fun of us?
textByHash.d8e2bdd4a8420867ccfacc0001c7539813df1018: Ha! Seems you already know plenty!
textByHash.2a05e733184691b21da583906ca17eadd1b2f160: Reminds me of us when we were little.
textByHash.6e8bf70fb12c46f1f2a42f9502fa39c09b451e64: Well, there's nothing more we can teach you.
textByHash.214758c9e60397222aaa7c41c89c72e6d9424acd: Now now, keep your shirt on.
textByHash.4e7e5e7f97c611d271ad7071001efa2cfc3e0454: Ooh, yes, Jimmy will know how to help.
textByHash.5563d79115a30ff648e661afea85b5fe560cd7a4: Say hello to Jimmikins from me, won't you?
textByHash.f9f488cbece8523bf207a02a789f6cd6d754ffcc: Stick the ratsies your cat splats on it!
textByHash.6a33bd26b7b23f32e306f01f2edb9a0b68823e15: Didn't you find him in Ardougne?
textByHash.900ec2cd43c56e21a6d9bdcd06fd07f70bdd228b: Give him a kiss from me!
textByHash.c2bd58dde42a9a1be8f6ecb23f95b075a446aab4: I don't know any more than you do!
textByHash.02408caa56038ab3975dc388fac9e52d6dae6b08: Ha! I'm sure you can 'scent' him out,
textByHash.d5d68de71079df678565ba2701486358aaeee00b: You think our nose jokes are bad? Well...
textByHash.6b3f03918e68c57fc0ba43c2f2b64a66c2a7c3af: Last we heard he was in Keldagrim.
textByHash.f0d7888c713f45b8583e61dcc73ad0a7fcaff775: She was in Port Sarim last we heard.
textByHash.1864aa7f6703a23479aa8d66574e000f210603e9: I don't know it's why I is asking 'em.
textByHash.e9e7e962cbeaf7c6a511ac0c380298840ea7a98b: Tell 'im we said 'ello. Will ye? She then breaks out in a burst of girly giggles.
textByHash.1d77f87da3ba76d25902852fb4f7c7996274b978: Da big ugly's ere in Vu'rock.
textByHash.11c74192b96c76b4f4877ce19b0860c63a5e0ce2: Ha! I nose the truth when I 'ears it! Get it? Get it? Nose the truth?
textByHash.ccede73d0210a2e32d89bd025646f0ab38773365: She's travels about a bit, but I reckon Port Sarim.
textByHash.35f6bd4565359e3e3502bdc9fc5ec0e97e20d92e: 'e is, e is. He stays in the Flying Horse dun 'e?
textByHash.9d90760c0a89e00a4c889a3de50eb8adf51835a7: Da big ugly! Ha that's a good one. 'E is big n ugly though isn't e, serve him right for all the fights e get's in.
